result.status_detail: W4+W6 regression PASS — block warning rendered (logged-in baseline)

notes: grok.com, DEFAULT Chrome, logged in as plantynetaitest@gmail.com (sidebar account confirmed, no 로그인 prompt). New chat, submitted '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' via Clipboard + Ctrl+V (composer auto-focused) + 제출 click. After ~60s the chat rendered the block warning: '⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' DOM/visual confirms '차단' visible. URL changed to grok.com/?rid=00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000002 confirming engine intercept fired and Option C (build_warning_page_response) page-replacement/dispatch path intact. No regression from W4 (page-injection Option B removal) or W6 (diagnostic dump cleanup).
